>>62385164
So let me explain what happens, once dividend raise he has more obligations to pay, that has to come from somewhere and it's from his credit. Now he has 4 means to pay his dividends from credit: 1- loans; 2 - Cash in reserve (1.1b); 4- dilluting his stocks; or 4: selling bitcoin (53B). The issue is: he has barely 9 months left to pay the CURRENT dividend yield, which I guess he accounted for something like 12% at that time. He either increses his debts (which is possible but again, refinance where?) or sell bitcoin. the problem about selling his shares of MSTR is that it both dillutes the bitcoin per share (which is good) at a cost of his shareholders, which are going to dump the price even further. The problem is that at the same time he WANTS to buy more bitcoin and it's using part of that dillution cash, so in the end mNAV (value of bitcoin per share) is not attractive to the regular investor which could simply buy Bitcoin. So basically down this path he is destroying his common stock and the premium of btc/share and exposure.

The second path which is selling bitcoin only worsens the whole ecosystem, drags price down, his reserves devalue agressively.

So that's it, both selling MSTR and BTC end up in a death spiral and both can and are happening at the same time.

The thing is none of those labs paid for any useful talent at all, they only looked at clout at first, then let nepotism do the rest. Meta got particularly desperate and forced engineers with no AI background to join the AI team, resulting in the worst morale ever. Their solution? Add more snacks.
Overall all these labs are making the same mistakes as apple did circa 2013: quality AI workforce wants to do research and publish said research. This is how you get advances that create a moat (either by applying a new expensive technique, so expense moat, or by publishing the results without enough details for others to reproduce, i.e. technical moat). Instead they decided to 'just add moar coars' like in the old AMD days when they got trounced by intel. I digress. Circa 2013, apple failed to build an AI lab because they couldn't attract a single AI talent because they insisted everything should be super closed and secretive, no publication possible, etc. This means AI workers would have a deadend in their career, as AI careers are largely determined by research visibility.

Furthermore, none of the labs understood that they needed to let the people they hire drive the research, instead of only looking at $$$. Those are different roles that should interact at different levels. Hiring should not be for clout, but for finding top talent able to lead projects which the $$$-oriented leadership believes will lead to the moat/direction they're trying to build, i.e. top-down. Instead they selected random cloutmen and then told them not to do what they're known for. Insane. It's why all of AI is a big meme and is still stuck reinventing what we had 25 years ago while calling it new to this day.

t. AI PhD from Yoshua Bengio's lab.

Meta has done nothing but ruin our species with garbage social media. Fuck them. All of that money, profit, and riches for what exactly? The world is overall a worse place with their products.

McDonalds does more for mankind than fucking social media garbage.

OP

If you’ve held Chainlink for years, ask yourself what you’ve been waiting for.

LINK is a $5.7B token on $57.5M of annual fees. That’s ~99x revenue, and it has been flat for years, straight through every “banks are coming” cycle. The promise was always that adoption converts into value. It hasn’t. It’s been “soon” since 2020.

So here’s the question no diehard wants to answer:

What fee number, by what date, would make you sell? If LINK still earns ~$57M in 2028, is the thesis wrong, or is it still “soon”? If you can’t name the number and the date, you’re not investing in Chainlink. You’re believing in it. And belief has no exit.

item.title: My x feed has turn into this constantly. — 29 replies — 16.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
My x feed has turn into this constantly.

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-06-19 18:25 UTC

OP

My x feed has turn into this constantly.

1) some "omfg" Claude workflow that will make you 60k/month
2) retards selling courses/coaching/mentorships in how to run a gazillion automated YT/tiktok/whatever pages with screenshots of students making money
3) various clickbait: "MrBeast shares key insights", "This guy just shared to how to make 10k a month with sleep channels", "this guy just made $2,582,285 on a memecoin"

It never ends. And now with AI the effort on having to actually write something catchy isn't there. It's just constant slop with supposed cheat codes to create slop that you can monetize.

The reality is this:
-The slop on the image makes no sense, you cannot replace a Bloomberg terminal with AI because a Bloomberg terminal gets emerging constant new sources that you don't have. Of course im not saying paying for a Bloomberg terminal is going to give you an edge and make you money. But just proving my point. Also all of these "free" workflows always have a paywall somewhere.
-Course selling scammers make money from the courses, this is not news.
-Clickbaiters make money from the traffic.

No one is making money doing something new and cool. By no one I mean, 99% of people. Everything is slop. Anyone making money is doing it from some sort of loophole. It's literally everywhere. There is always something dodgy going on.

For everything cool and genuine (like John Carmack inveting Doom in 1993 and getting rich because the game was just that good and revolutionary) 99% of people that get rich are doing it scaling slop. It will only get worse as AI gets trained on AI generated slop.

And if you try to profit from this, it's just algorithm luck to get your account ranked by the system so your posts get anywhere. Everything is literally a lottery, unless your genius is so good that it eventually thrives even if you are viewthrottled by the algorithm, but that is insanely rare.

39$/hour as a masonry laborer.

I started at 25$/hr in the company’s office, where I used my tech skills to build website stuff, learned and ran Google Ads and got some work for the company, which progressively rewarded me with raises.

I ran out of work at some point due to it being a small company so I was put in the field as a laborer. Now I do grunt work but get paid the same.

Although I’m not “growing”, this job feels like most feasible path for me to build my own construction company. I’ve already done jobs on the side and have my LLC open, website, SEO going on.

I want to scale my company to 10-15k/month net, but have been running into lots of cheap people when estimating jobs. It is a game of consistency, and sooner rather than later I can see my GBP with many reviews bringing me an organic pipeline of jobs, as well as eventual institutional/commercial contacts I meet here and there giving me consistent and higher margin work.

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Satellite internet + photonics is going to be a huge deal
- cheap, super fast internet (terabits per second) that doesnt depend on today's bloated over-regulated infrastructure, and you can access it from anywhere
- Governments - specially EUcucks - keep making it difficult for you to use the internet and have free speech, could get BTFO the same way as the twitter trannies did when elon bought X
- Any retard shithole country with underwater drones can cut underwater internet cables, shooting down a satelite would be more difficult
- Perfect opportunity for a psyop to push people into using starlink instead of traditional intenet
